economic_notes: Band holds 12.5% in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (forestry/natural resources), 100% in 0538053 BC Ltd (which holds 25% in Esh-kn-am Joint Venture and 25% in 9110 Investments Ltd), and 20% in Spayum Holdings LP. Investment income from business entities was $414,823. Forestry income reported at $127,968. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing impact.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets are amortized at rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related CMHC long-term debt rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS; (2) rents receivable of $225,547 not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification. No schedule of remuneration provided. Band does not prepare a formal budget so no budget figures presented. GBEs accounted for under modified equity method include Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (12.5%), 0538053 BC Ltd (100%), and Spayum Holdings LP (20%). Accounts receivable total of $747,779 includes trade AR of $522,232 plus rents receivable of $225,547. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $3,345,966 + CMHC $73,809 + First Nations Health Authority $986,811 + Natural Resources Canada $200,243 + Province of BC $574,129 + FNESC $84,503 + BC Aboriginal Child Care Society $90,475 + SCFSS $300,910 = $5,657,846; however FNHA and SCFSS may be non-government; conservative estimate used includes ISC, CMHC, NRCan, Province of BC, FNESC, BC Aboriginal Child Care Society, SCFSS, FNHA.
